response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js depth, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI, and cloud platform experience appears limited to some AWS CDK work. He would be a credible senior full-stack hire, but the gap against this staff-level GenAI specialization is too large.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP server and AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
15+ years of broad production engineering across web, backend, and embedded, with strong TypeScript/Node.js
Proven teaching, workshop, and mentoring track record suited to customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI-focused experience versus the required 8+ years
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Limited demonstrated cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK, no GCP/Azure or AI-on-cloud system design)
